title: Tower Cavaletto 12 Jar Rotating Spice Rack with Pre-Filled Spices, Optic White and Champagne Gold
features: ROTATING SPICE RACK: Convenient and stylish spice storage for your kitchen; this rack comes with a rotating design that makes it easier to access your seasonings while saving space in your cupboard

12 PRE-FILLED SPICES: Includes 12 glass storage jars, pre-filled with all of your favourite spices; coarse salt, bay leaves, rosemary, basil, parsley, oregano, fennel seeds, ground cinnamon, onion flakes, coriander, thyme and sage are ready to use straight away
EXTRA-STURDY STAND: The extra-sturdy construction ensures the stand stays firmly put on your countertop and keeps the jars secure when out of use
SEALED-IN FRESHNESS: Each jar comes topped with a champagne gold screw lid to seal in the freshness of your spices for longer

CAVALETTO COLLECTION: Presented in a bold optic white colour coating with champagne gold accents to elevate the look of your kitchen. You can complement your kitchenware with co-ordinating designs from the Tower Cavaletto collection
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 4 year extension, subject to product registration online

A BRAND YOU CAN TRUST: Tower is an iconic British brand boasting over 100 years of quality in manufacturing and design excellence. Tower is the UK’s fastest growing SDA & Housewares brand loved by millions of households
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value. Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Tower T826022WHT Cavaletto 12 Jar Rotating Spice Rack with Pre-Filled Spices, Optic White and Rose Gold Store your spice collection in style Conveniently store your spices with this Cavaletto 12 Jar Rotating Spice Rack. The rotating stand provides easy access and saves space in the kitchen, allowing you to keep your cupboards clutter-free. It comes with 12 jars pre-filled with a selection of spices including salt, rosemary, basil, parsley, oregano, fennel seeds, cinnamon, coriander, thyme and sage. Screw lids on each jar keep the freshness sealed in. Perfect to accompany the rest of the Tower Cavaletto collection.
